title: Technology partnership
description: Send All Your Marketing Data To Your Favorite BI Tool. Improvado marketing ETL solution has more than 190+ integrations that collect and automate your marketing data into one place, in real time. Reduce manual reporting time by 90%. No more API maintenance.
